creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan from comment #2)

Hi Ivan, thank you very much for your detailed information and yes, I had looked at FreshPorts beforehand.

The next thing I tried was to install Anki on FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE from the "latest" pkg repo, which didn't turn out to be a problem as Anki was present and ready for install.

However, Anki did not show at FreshPorts as available at this point, which you also mentioned in comment #2. So I tried to build Anki on FreeBSD 13.1 amd64 which was successful at the end.

Thus I'm guessing it could have been due www/qt6-webengine or devel/qt6-base not being able to build successfully for a short period of time:

https://portsfallout.com/fallout?port=qt6&maintainer=&env=&category=&flavor=

Regarding Freshports: Sometime it's just taking its time to get everything in sync.

I will therefore close this bug with "Overcome By Events".  If there is anything else, just open this bug again and I'll have a look at it.

Once again thanks for the report!
